title: microseris proxima
intro: Microseris proxima, also known as the 'Pygmy Chrysanthemum' or 'Pygmy Dandelion', is a small, annual flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Microseris proxima include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Microseris proxima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
